title: MCP Inventory Schema v1
description: Schema for per-workspace MCP server inventory tracking ports, PIDs, health status, and workspace registrations. Each workspace process maintains its own copy at .my/aicc/mcp-inventory.json.

version.description: Semantic version of the MCP inventory format

lastProbe.description: Timestamp of the last health probe scan

workspaceId.description: Unique identifier of the workspace that is the current leader

pid.description: Process ID of the leader MCP server

port.description: Port the leader MCP server is listening on

electedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the leader was elected

portRange.description: Configured port range for MCP server allocation

start.description: First port in the allocation range

end.description: Last port in the allocation range

servers.description: Array of all MCP server instances across the port range

port.description: Port number for this server slot

pid.description: Process ID if a server is running on this port

status.description: Current health status of this server slot

mcpVersion.description: MCP SDK version running on this port

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID that owns this server instance

lastHealthCheck.description: Timestamp of the last successful health check

startedAt.description: Timestamp when this server instance was started

workspacePath.description: Absolute file path to the workspace root

port.description: Port number assigned to this workspace's MCP server

version.description: AICC extension version running in this workspace

deployedSkills.description: List of skill IDs deployed in this workspace

registeredAt.description: Timestamp when this workspace registered with the MCP server
